metadata.name: Add a New Contact to a Customer Account

description: A new engineer at a customer company needs to be added as a technical contact on their account.

nodes.task_description: Find the customer's account in the CRM.

expected_outcome.value: Agent retrieves the correct customer account.

nodes.task_description: Add the new contact's name, title, email, and phone number.

expected_outcome.value: Agent enters the new contact's details accurately.

nodes.task_description: Assign the 'Technical Contact' role to the new person.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully sets the role for the new contact, ensuring they receive technical bulletins.
